content.full_text:
February 26, 1992

Deanne Stone, Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95812

RE: "Summary of 1992 Legislative Changes to the Conflict of Interest Disclosure Provisions of the Political Reform Act," Disclosure by Engineers and Land Surveyors.

Dear Ms. Stone:

With regard to the abovenoted item sent to me by the FPPC, does the amendment mean that engineers and land surveyors acting as consultants to the City of Arroyo Grande are not public officials and therefore not required to file Statements of Economic Interests?

The amendment may be found in Government Code Section 87100.1.

Thank you for your time and assistance in this matter.

Sincerely,

Nancy A. Davis, CMC
City Clerk
